inputs.label: Biparietal Diameter (BPD)
inputs.businessContext: Ultrasound measurement of the fetal head from one side to the other.

inputs.label: Head Circumference (HC)
inputs.businessContext: Circumference of the fetal head measured by ultrasound.

inputs.label: Abdominal Circumference (AC)
inputs.businessContext: Circumference of the fetal abdomen at the liver level.

inputs.label: Femur Length (FL)
inputs.businessContext: Length of the fetal femur bone.
